title: aneilema lanceolatum subsp. subnudum
intro: Aneilema lanceolatum subsp. subnudum, also known as the Naked Aneilema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, particularly its leaves which are known to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Aneilema lanceolatum subsp. subnudum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various conditions, including colds, coughs, and skin infections.
